title: galium spurium subsp. tenerum
intro: Galium spurium subsp. tenerum, also known as the fragrant bedstraw or tender bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium spurium plant, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The medicinal properties of Galium spurium subsp. tenerum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Galium spurium subsp. tenerum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves and stems of the plant.
